textSections.section: How to Fill : UPSSSC UP Assistant Boring Technician Recruitment Online Form 2026
textSections.content: There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC UP Assistant Boring Technician Recruitment Advt No. 04-Exam/2026 Recruitment 2026. | First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category. | Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2025 Registration Number and OTP Password. | After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.

jobs.shortInfo: National Testing Agency NTA has released the Exam City 2026 for Indian Council of Agricultural Research ICAR AIEEA PG and Phd Admissions 2026 will start from 08 May 2026 and the last date to apply will be 07 June 2026.candidates should read the ICAR AIEEA 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and University List, information and other types of information and then apply

faq.question: RPSC Senior Teacher TGT Online Form Start Date?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 19 August 2025.

faq.question: RPSC Senior Teacher TGT 07/2025 Exam Date 2026?
faq.answer: The Examination will be conducted in 12-18 July 2026

faq.question: Where can I find the syllabus for the Rajasthan RPSC Sr. Teacher TGT 07/2025 Examination?
faq.answer: The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the RPSC Rajasthan TGT Sr. Teacher Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.

faq.question: Rajasthan RPSC Senior Teacher Grade II TGT Recruitment Last Date?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 17 September 2025.

faq.question: What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
faq.answer: Candidates can pay the application fee up to 17 September 2025.
